mechanism_narrative: An increase in real retail sales (RSAFS) signals strengthening consumer demand, which boosts growth expectations and raises the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC for RSAFS monthly change vs 20-day yield change is below 0.05 or negative over 2-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate (UNRATE) rises above 6.5%, it signals labor market slack that reduces inflation expectations and lowers yields; the signal is activated by a crossing threshold and fades after 5 days.
failure_condition: In triggered instances, the 5-day forward yield change is not negative with 95% confidence, or the signal fails to generate a negative average return over 20 occurrences.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is below 2% and CPI inflation (CPIAUCSL) is rising at a 3-month pace above 0.5%, policy is perceived as too accommodative, increasing inflation expectations and causing the 10-year yield to rise over the next 20 days.
regime_hint: inflationary pressure with loose monetary policy
failure_condition: In joint-triggered periods, the 20-day yield change is not significantly positive (t-test p<0.10), or Rank IC of the interaction term is below 0.03 over 3 years.

mechanism_narrative: During an economic contraction (INDPRO 6-month change negative), a subsequent rise in industrial production signals a nascent recovery that reduces recession risk premium, leading to lower 10-year yields over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: When triggered and INDPRO turns positive, the 60-day forward yield average is not lower than during nontriggered periods (one-sided test p>0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the 12-month change in the CPI index (CPIAUCSL) exceeds 3%, inflation expectations become unanchored and push the 10-year yield higher over the following 20 trading days.
failure_condition: In triggered months, 20-day yield change is not positive in at least 60% of instances over the walk-forward period.

mechanism_narrative: A concurrent rise in housing starts (HOUST) and a low federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS below 2%) signals a strong housing sector supported by accommodative policy, boosting growth expectations and raising the 10-year yield over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal does not produce positive 20-day yield returns with a hit rate >55% over any 2-year period, or the interaction coefficient is not significant in a regression.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in industrial production (INDPRO 3-month change < -1%) signals a supply shock or imminent recession, prompting a flight to safety that reduces the 10-year yield over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: In triggered months, the 5-day forward yield change is not negative with a mean below -5bp, or the signal fails in more than 40% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: When retail sales (RSAFS) rise more than 1% over 3 months and the unemployment rate (UNRATE) falls more than 0.2 percentage points over the same period, the combined demand and labor strength revises growth expectations upward, pushing the 10-year yield higher over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces a positive yield return in fewer than 55% of triggered instances over any 2-year walk-forward window, or the interaction Rank IC is below 0.05.
